steps.title: Identify the plural requirement
steps.content: ”These” is plural, two different word counts are specified (19,565 and 27,379 words, respectively), and the verb “correlate” is plural.

steps.title: Apply plural agreement
steps.content: A plural subject is needed to match the plural verb “correlate.” D) “constitutions' lengths” pairs the plural possessive “constitutions'” with the plural noun “lengths,” creating a plural subject. The other options fail by using singular nouns (A and C) or improper possessive marking (B). That matches choice D — D is correct.
